summaryTemplate: {{className}} is the {{patternRole}}. It declares several virtual create methods so one concrete factory builds a coherent family of matching products. Pattern body lives at {{file}}:{{lineStart}}-{{lineEnd}}.
chosenRationaleTemplate: Tagged as Abstract Factory because {{className}} declares two or more virtual create methods (lines {{lineStart}}-{{lineEnd}}) — the family-of-products interface, distinct from a single Factory Method.

abstract_factory_create_method.note: A product creator. Grouping several on one interface declares which products must come from the same family.

abstract_factory_second_create.note: A second product creator. More than one create method is what separates an Abstract Factory from a plain Factory Method.

runnerUpComparisonTemplates.Factory Method: Factory Method is one virtual create returning one product. Abstract Factory bundles several create methods so an entire family of related products varies together.
